name: kit-fashion
title: Fashion Kit (scoped)
description: Fashion-domain blocks: color/material swatch · pantone chip · season tag · size matrix · measurement diagram · BOM table · style card · lookbook tile · tech-pack A4. Domain-scoped, not universal.

files.content:
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SCOPE: SCOPED — fashion DOMAIN kit, not universal foundation.
   Reusable only inside QuantyFin fashion products (PLM, lookbook,
   vendor portal). Do not treat as a base primitive.
   See README "Scope classification".
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   QuantyFin Fashion Kit · INDEX
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Fashion-aware composites for PLM, lookbook, vendor portal.

   Load AFTER colors_and_type + the Tailwind component layer:
     <link rel="stylesheet" href="colors_and_type.css" />
     <link rel="stylesheet" href="tailwind/quantyfin.components.css (inline)" />
     <link rel="stylesheet" href="ui_kits/quantyFin-fashion/index.css" />

   Compatible with all surfaces; primarily used under
   [data-surface="app"] for PLM screens.
   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

@import url('./atoms.css');
